name: better-telegram-mcp
description: Telegram dual-mode (Bot API + MTProto) — messages, chats, media, contacts

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.title: Bot token (bot mode)
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: From @BotFather. Required for stdio bot mode. Leave empty for user mode (HTTP only).

TELEGRAM_PHONE.title: Phone number (user mode, HTTP only)
TELEGRAM_PHONE.description: International format (e.g. +84xxxxxxxxx). Used by user mode HTTP flow only - not stdio bot mode.
